hero.title: Start-Up Plan
hero.description: Fast-track your business with automated workflows that eliminate repetitive manual steps. Streamline processes, boost productivity, and unlock efficiency across departments. Grow sustainably without adding extra headcount or stretching your team.

card.title: Start-Up Plan
card.description: Built for early-stage teams that want to automate smarter, and scale faster.
card.messageDescription: The Startup Plan includes everything you need to eliminate manual work, unlock productivity, and automate your first end-to-end processes with MIRYA.

decisions.label: AI-Powered Decisions
decisions.title: What is included
decisions.description: MIRYA's automation intelligence works across your existing tools and systems, powering end-to-end flows.

cards.title: Visual Workflow Builder
cards.description: Design automations with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface—no coding needed.

cards.title: Multi-Platform Automation
cards.description: Automate desktop, web, and cloud apps seamlessly in one unified tool.

cards.title: Smart Recording
cards.description: Create workflows automatically by simply recording your actions.

cards.title: Autonomous Bots
cards.description: Schedule and run bots independently to keep your processes moving 24/7.

cards.title: Built-In AI Assistance
cards.description: Let Mirya analyze data, read documents, detect patterns, and make decisions.

cards.title: Secure Local Execution
cards.description: Your data stays protected with local encryption and on-device processing.

cards.title: Sub-Processes & Dynamic Variables
cards.description: Build flexible, modular workflows that adapt to changing process data.

cards.title: Analytics Dashboard
cards.description: Monitor performance and identify automation opportunities in real time.

eligibility.title: Am I Eligible?
eligibility.subtitle: Your startup must meet the following criteria:
criteria: You can use the startup discounted plan for one year, or longer if you still meet the requirements.

cta.title: Accelerate Your Operations Today
cta.description: Automate your first workflow and experience how quickly your team can eliminate manual work and operate smarter.

enquiry.title: Enterprise Enquiry Form
enquiry.description: This form is for organizations interested in MIRYA’s Enterprise automation solutions and tailored support packages. If you’re looking to explore MIRYA’s standard plans, you can visit our Pricing or Documentation pages.
